description: You are an 8th-grade Earth Science teacher designing a 'Data Science in Astronomy' module on the Sugar Learning Platform. Create a Python script at /home/ga/Documents/meteorite_analyzer.py that analyzes the meteorite dataset at /home/ga/Documents/meteorites.csv. The script must identify the 10 most massive meteorites in descending order and calculate the average mass of all meteorites with valid numeric mass data (skipping empty or non-numeric fields). Generate an output file at /home/ga/Documents/top_10_meteorites.txt listing the top 10 meteorites in the format "1. [Name] - [Mass] g" followed by the average mass rounded to exactly two decimal places in the format "Average Mass: [Value] g".
